states.name: ATLAS Core Idle
states.core_behavior: slow breathing amber orb with transparent orbital rings
states.description: Default calm state inspired by the user's third reference image. Low noise, centered core, no clutter.

states.name: Hermes Active State
states.core_behavior: blue-white core with robotics/design nodes unfolding from center
states.description: Hermes awakens as the robotics, design, CAD, and blueprint interface.

states.name: Ajani Active State
states.core_behavior: crimson engineering core with system and build nodes unfolding
states.description: Ajani awakens as the engineering, systems, build, and feasibility interface.

states.name: Minerva Active State
states.core_behavior: teal-green science core with organic knowledge nodes unfolding
states.description: Minerva awakens as the science, biology, plant, medicine, and environmental interface.

states.name: Council Active State
states.core_behavior: purple executive core with Ajani, Hermes, and Minerva streams merging
states.description: Council mode merges all AI perspectives and displays executive decisions.

states.name: World Knowledge Mode
states.core_behavior: global source lights feed knowledge streams into the active AI
states.description: Shows where ATLAS is learning from around the world.
